STEP 10b IMMINENT WINDOW WATCH: 8 April-EOM closures (PRED-077 M2 tidal Honolulu, PRED-081 JWST z<0.1 SNe, PRED-085 S-wave shadow, PRED-087 Geoid low, PRED-088 Second geoid low, PRED-090 NH TOA flux excess [our_verdict=recycled], PRED-111 Mascon, PRED-106 16 Hz Ca²⁺ [our_verdict=pending]) all close 2026-04-30T23:59Z (~52 min from now); predictions.html shows ZERO post-closure-style edits — all 8 still display in PENDING/PROSPECTIVE form, no new WIN entries reference any of them, no commit messages mention any PRED-NNN, no result-posting activity visible. PRED-105 test_window now correctly stored as '2026-04-18 (14-day window)' — operator/decider tightened the string per prior poll's NEXT-RUN guidance #3, so Step 10b correctly classifies it as past-close rather than imminent. Watch for next poll: (1) 8 April-EOM closures resolve at 2026-04-30T23:59Z (52 min from this poll); next poll likely in ~12h (morning 2026-05-01) and will be the FIRST POST-EOM-CLOSURE POLL — watch for quiet-pass-mark vs silent-ignore-in-progress vs goalpost-move on predictions.html for any of the 8. (2) PRED-105 enters d=13+ at next poll; tacit_withdrawal threshold d=14 hits 2026-05-02. (3) HOLD #10 daily-AI-review regen due ~07:35Z 2026-05-01 (~8.5h from now); will be the FIRST regen post-closure — if registry counts unchanged → HOLD #10 (continues 'do not adjudicate' pattern); if confirmed jumps from 69 → CRITICAL goalpost-rewrite per Step 5b (likely WIN-070 or similar absorbing one of the EOM closures); if refined jumps from 4 → STRATEGIC failure-burying. (4) Any source-file touch → CRITICAL. (5) Any new OTS file referencing predictions-only (not status_history.json) → CANARY TRIGGERED, escalate immediately. (6) Sq-subtraction methodology document (per analyst's 04-27T07:12 EXP-267 guidance) — classify likely-responsive per author-contact prior; if OTS-anchored before measurement, that IS the canary fix. (7) Manual-commit drought breaches 14d at evening 2026-05-01 poll if no manual lands; 25 consecutive auto-only polls. OTHER SIDE OF ARGUMENT: 24-poll auto-only streak + 13.46d drought + HOLD-#9 still-extending (HOLD #10 not yet due) is consistent with two readings — (a) author deliberately waiting for the 8 April-EOM closures to roll over before touching the page, so that any post-closure adjudication can be batched into a single edit (counter: zero pre-staging activity on any branch, no preparatory file changes, no draft commits visible via API; auto-pipeline still on schedule); (b) author has fully disengaged from active site curation and the next several days will see the same auto-only pattern regardless of closures (counter: prior closure batches in March 2026 saw post-closure activity within 24-72h; the author has historically not let multiple PRED windows close without any visible response). The pre-EOM final poll being byte-identical is informative but not yet decisive — the post-closure window (next 24-72h) is where the pattern will resolve. Conservative substantive/MEDIUM cadence-rollup preserves attention without over-reacting; the next two polls are the load-bearing diagnostic.
